# Support Ukraine <img alt="ukraine" height="32" width="32" src="https://github.githubassets.com/images/icons/emoji/unicode/1f1fa-1f1e6.png">

While you're reading this text we're suffering from russia's bombs. Please help us to stand against russia's invasion and prevent World War III. It's pretty easy with **[UNITED24 fundraising platform](https://u24.gov.ua/)**. Thank you!

## MIX

[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Custom-blue?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,%2BPC9zdmc%2BCg%3D%3D&label=License&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/KaMeHb-UA/mix/blob/master/LICENSE)
[![Runtime](https://img.shields.io/badge/Runtime-QML-41CD52?logo=qt&logoColor=41CD52&style=flat-square)](https://doc.qt.io/archives/qt-5.15/qtqml-javascript-hostenvironment.html)
[![Build](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/KaMeHb-UA/mix/package.yml?branch=master&style=flat-square&label=Build&logo=github)](https://github.com/KaMeHb-UA/mix/actions/workflows/package.yml)
[![GitHub release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/KaMeHb-UA/mix?label=GitHub%20release&logo=github&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/KaMeHb-UA/mix/releases)

Native [Ubuntu Touch](https://www.ubuntu-touch.io/) [Matrix](https://matrix.org/) client with E2EE and push notifications. GUI is written in [QML](https://doc.qt.io/archives/qt-5.15/qtqml-index.html), logic - in [Typescript](https://www.typescriptlang.org).
